acceptance_criteria.text: detectTopology(env, fsAccess) exported, returns { target, authToken, authSource } shape per plan §Data Model

proof.summary: module.exports = { detectTopology }; function returns { target, authToken, authSource } per lines 53-87

acceptance_criteria.text: target resolves: env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL → fallback 'https://api.anthropic.com'; trailing slash stripped

proof.summary: Lines 55-58: rawBase = (env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL && env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.trim()) || ''; target = rawBase ? rawBase.replace(/\/+$/, '') : 'https://api.anthropic.com'
Case 1 (no env → api.anthropic.com), Case 3 (env URL used), Case 4 (trailing slash stripped), Case 7 (literal api.anthropic.com), Case 8 (empty string → api.anthropic.com)

acceptance_criteria.text: authToken resolves: env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN → env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY → readCredsToken(fs) → null

proof.summary: Lines 61-86: three-branch chain with explicit auth source labeling; readCredsToken(fsAccess) reads creds.json via fsAccess param
Cases 1-8 + extra cases cover all chain positions including env-wins-over-creds and empty-string-treated-as-unset

acceptance_criteria.text: authSource reflects which source supplied the token (string or null)

proof.summary: authSource set to 'env:ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN', 'env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'creds.json', or null on each return path

acceptance_criteria.text: Function is pure: no I/O outside fsAccess argument; no global process.env reads outside env argument

proof.summary: Grep returns only comment-line occurrences (lines 8, 49). No executable code reads process.env or imports fs directly. readCredsToken receives fsAccess parameter and uses only fsAccess.existsSync / fsAccess.readFileSync.

acceptance_criteria.text: Zero string-literal references to cpa|cliproxyapi|cache-fix in topology.js (FR-1 enforcement)

proof.summary: Grep tool returns 'No matches found' — zero occurrences. FR-1 enforcement passes.

test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_1_native_no_env_no_creds: case 1: native (no env, no creds) → api.anthropic.com, no auth
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_2_native_no_env_fresh_creds: case 2: native (no env, fresh creds) → authToken from creds.json
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_3_proxy_base_url_and_auth_token: case 3: proxy via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL + ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN → both env values used
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_4_proxy_trailing_slash: case 4: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL with trailing slash → target has slash stripped
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_5_api_key_only: case 5: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY only → authToken from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, no creds fallback needed
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_6_auth_token_wins_over_creds: case 6: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN set + creds also valid → env wins
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_7_literal_api_anthropic_com: case 7: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL set to api.anthropic.com literal → target is api.anthropic.com
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_8_empty_string_treated_as_unset: case 8: empty string env-var → treated as unset, falls through to creds.json

extra_robustness_cases: extra: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY wins over creds.json when ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN absent
extra: corrupt creds.json → authToken null, no throw
extra: creds.json present but claudeAiOauth.accessToken missing → authToken null
extra: multiple trailing slashes → all stripped from target

no_new_deps.note: package.json has no 'dependencies' or 'devDependencies' keys — grep returns no matches

known_gaps: Test run exit code not directly verified via shell execution (PowerShell/Bash tools not available in this agent context). All 12 test cases manually traced against implementation logic — each assertion maps to a verified code path in topology.js.
